fields.name: Purchase This Month
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount of purchase invoices for the current month.

fields.name: Overdue Purchase Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices where your payment is late.

fields.name: POs Pending Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase orders that are pending approval.

fields.name: Approved Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase orders that are approved.

fields.name: Purchase Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase quotes.

fields.name: Purchase Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase orders.

fields.name: Ongoing Purchase Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of ongoing purchase invoices.

fields.name: Purch. Invoices Due Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are due next week.

fields.name: Posted Purch. Inv. This Month
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted purchase invoices for the current month.

fields.name: Posted Purch. Cr. Memo TM
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of posted purchase credit memos for the current month.

fields.name: Purchase Documents Due Today
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are due today.

fields.name: Purch. Documents Due Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are due next week.

fields.name: Purchase Discounts Next Week
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of purchase invoices that are due next week and have a payment discount.

fields.name: Unprocessed Payments
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of unprocessed payments.

fields.name: Outstanding Vendor Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of invoices from your vendors that have not been paid yet.
